text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... The air is crisp and refreshing...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's impressive you show so much drive this early
in the morning.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You plan to go for a run, I assume? Would you
mind if I came along?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Of course not. But why are you up this early?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Surely you remember the events of last winter? A
certain someone took off running in the morning,
never to return.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... Hehe, I think I remember.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This year won't be a repeat of the last. I plan to
monitor you the whole way through.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I always appreciate it, Air Groove. So, let's get
going.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... She never knows how to hold back... Don't go sprinting off!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(Perhaps it's the clear winter air, but Air Groove's
footsteps sound...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Perhaps it's the calm of early morning, but
Suzuka's breathing sounds...)

text_block_list.name: Suzuka & Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (Closer than usual.)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wait a moment, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We've done enough running. It's time to head
back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Already? That flew by so fast...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... If I hadn't spoken up, I fear you
would've run to the corners of the earth.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... But if that happened, I know you would
come running after me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Just like in our races.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hah. Either way, I'm not letting you escape. So
stay on your toes.
